message:
feat(wezterm): PaneWaiter::wait_for_with_cx + WaitResult::Cancelled (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds Cx-first variant for the PaneWaiter poll loop — the primary
wait-for-pattern surface used by workflows, robot mode, and MCP.
Callers threading `&Cx` through their API can now cancel a
long-running wait mid-sleep deterministically instead of burning
the remaining backoff budget.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+126 src)

   a. `WaitResult::Cancelled { reason, polls }` variant added.

      Distinct from `Matched` / `TimedOut` — surfaces that the
      caller's capability context was cancelled before or during
      the wait. Shape matches `event_stream::WaitResult::Cancelled`
      for downstream scraper parity.

   b. `PaneWaiter::wait_for_with_cx(cx, pane_id, matcher, timeout)`

      Mirrors `wait_for` with three Cx-aware changes:

        * Pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()` before the first poll. A
          caller-cancelled wait returns `WaitResult::Cancelled`
          immediately without touching the source.

        * Mid-loop `cx.checkpoint()` after each poll, before the
          exponential-backoff sleep. Operator can cancel between
          polls.

        * `sleep_with_cx(cx, duration)` bounds the between-poll
          backoff sleep. Mid-sleep cancellation surfaces
          `WaitResult::Cancelled` rather than burning remaining
          budget.

      `PaneTextSource::get_text` still uses ambient Cx (trait not
      Cx-aware yet); most of the wait's latency is in the backoff
      sleep which IS now Cx-first.

2. crates/frankenterm-core/src/workflows/wait_execution.rs (+11)

   Adds a Cancelled arm to the `WaitResult` match in
   `execute_pattern_wait` (pinned by exhaustiveness). Maps
   Cancelled → TimedOut with the reason in `last_observed` so
   downstream `WaitConditionResult` consumers see a
   timeout-shaped outcome consistent with the existing
   workflow semantics.

3. crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp_tools.rs (+21)

   Adds Cancelled arms to both MCP wait-for consumers:

     * `WaitForTool::call` surfaces an MCP_ERR_TIMEOUT error with
       the cancellation reason and a "retry, cancellation is not a
       timeout" hint.

     * `SendTool::call`'s wait verification maps Cancelled →
       `McpWaitForData { matched: false }` + a
       `verification_error` describing the cancellation.

Legacy `wait_for` returns Match | TimedOut only; Cancelled is a
pure addition surfaced by the new _with_cx variant. No observable
change for non-migrated callers.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
    (no new tests — wait-loop contract is covered by existing
    PaneWaiter tests + sleep_with_cx LabRuntime tests)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. WeztermHandle now has 11
Cx-first methods; PaneWaiter gains its first Cx-first entry point
separately (the wait-loop is not a WeztermHandle method).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
